attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00023, derived from source AUC-023) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-CARD-01 bucket.

Difficulty tier set to atypical_presentation_high_risk (DD=04 convention not applied here as case_id numbering follows source AUC sequence per protocol §9.1 exception noted for this batch; maintainer to confirm whether DD prefix should be reassigned to 04) — flagged for maintainer review given the diagnostic subtlety of distinguishing tamponade from 'simply worsening pericarditis'.

Source note describes in-person fluid bolus consideration and ICP-level 000 dispatch already having occurred; presentation layer models the case at the point of initial telehealth contact per protocol reprojection rules.

Vitals (BP 85/70, narrowed pulse pressure), muffled heart sounds, elevated JVP, and pulsus paradoxus were clinician-observed findings and sealed into 10/11 rather than placed in patient-reportable content.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
